name: No Cook Peanut Butter Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the peanut butter and margarine in a double boiler.
2. Add the butterscotch chips to the melted mixture and stir until smooth.
3. Stir in the remaining ingredients: coconut, marshmallows, salt, and vanilla.
4. Pour the mixture into a greased 9 x 9 inch pan.
5. Allow the mixture to cool in the refrigerator before serving.
